response.justification: The candidate is a strong, versatile senior software engineer with 15+ years across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems, and their recent work on MCP code generators and agentic-workflow tooling touches the role's key technologies. However, the role requires 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions, and the resume shows only about a year of AI-adjacent work with no evidence of RAG architectures, vector databases, LLM evaluation pipelines, or AI systems on cloud platforms — the core of this Staff Forward Deployed GenAI role.
strengths: Recent hands-on MCP and agentic-workflow infrastructure experience directly matching key technologies
Deep, broad engineering background (TypeScript, Node.js, AWS CDK, low-latency systems) with strong craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD)
Proven communication and mentorship skills via workshops, conference talks, and multi-day courses
concerns: Falls far short of the required 8+ years building AI-driven solutions (~1 year of AI-adjacent work)
No demonstrated RAG, vector database, LLM evaluation, or multi-agent framework (LangGraph/CrewAI) experience
No evidence of leading customer-facing technical discovery or transitioning AI prototypes to production at enterprise scale
